data.summary: Exploratory evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure.
data.assessment: The exploratory step aimed to validate the requirement for accommodations management, specifically regarding extra time and breaks during the exam. However, the evidence provided does not include any API reads or checks that confirm the implementation of this requirement. The linked use case mentions accommodations management but lacks concrete evidence of how this is operationalized, leading to a clear gap in meeting the requirement.
gaps: No evidence of API endpoints or data confirming the implementation of accommodations management (extra time, breaks).

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add evidence for accommodations management
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify the accommodations management requirement.
